title: Pithampur Heat Wave
lead: Pithampur is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +5.71. This extreme weather event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Pithampur has resulted in extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 19.0 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 29%, and the wind speed is approximately 20.7 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 The city's weather conditions are expected to remain critical, with no relief in sight, as indicated by the 0.0 GG Heating Degree Day (HDD) value.
conclusion: Activate emergency protocols to mitigate the heat wave's impact on the city's infrastructure and residents.
